patch.value: Full audit covering code quality, search/vector, calendar, SDK, telemetry, CI/CD, and agent output optimization. All systems verified working. Key findings documented as child items.
All phases 0-9 completed, findings documented, no regressions

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Audit complete. 9 phases executed: (0) Bootstrap verified v2026.5.2, security scan clean, gitignore correct. (1) Dogfood: all 10 item types, lifecycle ops, calendar, search, extensions tested in temp dir. (2a) Architecture: main.ts 2555 lines with 4 more extraction candidates. (2b) Dead code: parseLimit/parsePriority/parseType duplicated across 8+ files. (2c) Type safety: all EXIT_CODE usage correct, no process.exit() calls, silent catches documented. (2d) Performance: list 62ms, search hybrid 3.9s with 647 items. (3) Search: Ollama auto-detection, deduplication, LanceDB atomic persistence, GC all working. (4) Calendar: all views/formats/recurrence/filters working. (5) SDK: 9 capability types, starter extension comprehensive. (6) Telemetry: scrubbing thorough, queue retry with backoff, ops runbook created. (7) CI/CD: all action versions current, multi-OS/Node matrix, security scan in all workflows. (8) Agent output: TOON-first, JSON errors with next_steps/examples, contracts schema v4. (9) 3 findings documented as child items.

author: audit-agent

patch.value: All 9 audit phases complete. 1095/1095 tests pass. 3 improvement items documented. No security issues. No regressions.

message: Close audit epic - all phases verified

patch.value: 9-phase audit of pm CLI v2026.5.2 completed successfully. All systems verified working.
Complete audit coverage with all findings documented as pm items
82 test files, 1095 tests pass. 3 non-critical improvement items created. No security issues or regressions found.
